---
title: "Browse Datasets"
---

Use the filters below to find datasets for your course.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
data = FileAttachment("datasets.json").json()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
allMethods = [...new Set(data.flatMap(d => d.methods))]
allConcepts = [...new Set(data.flatMap(d => d.concepts))]
allDisciplines = [...new Set(data.flatMap(d => d.discipline))]
allSourceTypes = [...new Set(data.flatMap(d => [d.data_source_type]))]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof selectedMethod = Inputs.select(
  ["(All)", ...allMethods],
  { label: "Statistical method" }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof selectedConcept = Inputs.select(
  ["(All)", ...allConcepts],
  { label: "Teaching concept" }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof selectedDiscipline = Inputs.select(
  ["(All)", ...allDisciplines],
  { label: "Discipline" }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof selectedSourceType = Inputs.select(
  ["(All)", ...allSourceTypes],
  { label: "Data source type" }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
filtered = data.filter(d =>
  (selectedMethod === "(All)" || d.methods.includes(selectedMethod)) &&
  (selectedConcept === "(All)" || d.concepts.includes(selectedConcept)) &&
  (selectedDiscipline === "(All)" || d.discipline.includes(selectedDiscipline)) &&
  (selectedSourceType === "(All)" || d.data_source_type === selectedSourceType)
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(filtered, {
  columns: ["id", "title", "methods", "concepts", "course_level", "discipline", "n_obs"],
  format: {
    title: (t, i) => html`<a href="datasets/${filtered[i].id}.html">${t}</a>`
  }
})
```
